title: ACTREC Recruitment 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for Scientific Assistant Posts
description: The Advanced Centre for Treatment, Research and Education in Cancer (ACTREC) has announced the official notification for 2026. To fill up the various vacancies for Scientific Assistant Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified in the B.Sc DMLT can grab this chance and apply for the ACTREC Recruitment 2026 . Here we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts. If you are looking for more, here is a list of Go...
